cnbc.title: Judge in Musk v. Altman seats nine-person jury. Opening arguments start Tuesday
cnbc.summary: The Musk v. Altman trial kicked off at a federal courthouse in Oakland, California, with jury selection followed by opening arguments.

cnbc.title: Cole Allen charged with trying to assassinate Trump at WHCD event
cnbc.summary: The Secret Service is facing scrutiny over security at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, where President Donald Trump was evacuated Saturday.

cnbc.title: Trump discussed Iran's Hormuz Strait proposal with top aides, White House says
cnbc.summary: The Trump administration has repeatedly insisted that the central goal of the conflict is keeping Iran from ever obtaining a nuclear weapon.

cnbc.title: Saba Capital finds little appetite for tender offer of shares in Blue Owl, Starwood private credit funds
cnbc.summary: Investors' disinterest in getting liquidity at a steep discount comes amid a quarter that saw elevated redemptions across most private-credit, non-traded BDCs.

cnbc.title: Congressional Republicans rally around Trump's White House ballroom project
cnbc.summary: A group of Senate Republicans is proposing a bill to authorize $400 million in federal funds for the construction of a White House ballroom.

cnbc.title: Trump ballroom lawsuit plaintiff rejects DOJ demand to drop case after 'assassination attempt'
cnbc.summary: Trump and others say the proposed White House ballroom would be much more secure than the Washington Hilton Hotel, where Saturday's shooting occurred.

cnbc.title: Micron and Sandisk continue rally as demand for memory expected to persist
cnbc.summary: Shares of Micron and Sandisk jumped after Melius Research said in a report that demand for memory will remain strong through the end of the decade.

cnbc.title: Ray Dalio says Kevin Warsh shouldn't cut interest rates in a ‘stagflation’ era
cnbc.summary: Dalio said that if Kevin Warsh were to cut rates, it would risk damaging confidence in the central bank at a critical moment.

cnbc.title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
cnbc.summary: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce

cnbc.title: Spotify teams up with Peloton to launch global fitness content hub
cnbc.summary: Spotify teams with Peloton to launch fitness content, potentially opening new revenue streams while expanding Peloton’s global reach.
